---
title: 'Then there&#39;s the other side...'
date: '2017-12-20T16:09:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8036933877579604406'
blogger_filename: '/2017/12/then-there-other-side.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p dir="ltr">After another fitful night, sore neck, dreams of solving crime and putting together a family album in one...</p>
<p dir="ltr">I woke up thinking, I'd kinda of like to have sex with my wife. The other stuff aren't non issues in this moment, but it wieghs less, no pun intended.</p>
